listings.address: 606 Edwards Ferry Rd NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: Tucked into an ideal in-town Leesburg location, this charming property offers the rare combination of convenience, privacy, and freedom with no HOA. Imagine starting your mornings on the long, welcoming front porch, surrounded by the beauty of the shaded front yard, or unwinding there in the evening as the neighborhood settles into a peaceful rhythm. Inside, the spacious layout is designed for both everyday comfort and effortless entertaining, with an oversized kitchen that serves as the heart of the home and a generously sized living room where family and friends can gather with ease. Outside, the detached two-car garage provides exceptional flexibility for hobbyists, car enthusiasts, or those in need of workshop space, while ample parking ensures plenty of room for guests. Just moments from the shops, restaurants, events, and historic charm of downtown Leesburg, this home offers the perfect balance of accessibility, character, and the privacy that's increasingly hard to find.

Welcome to beautiful Potomac Crossing! A neighborhood nestled between Historic Downtown Leesburg and the Potomac River. This 5BR, 3.5Ba home is spread out over 3400+ sq.ft. of fine finished living. There is so much charm to this home. One of the original model homes, this original owner opted to convert to the sales office (which is where the garage would've been) in a bedroom suite. It's really cool. A new owner could opt to convert it to a garage. This home has been wonderfully maintained. A new owner will certainly want to put their own upgraded touches on the property if the choose but it's ready to move-in. One of the few single family homes in the area still under $800k. Come and get it! Open House 7/5/26 from 12-2pm.

More pictures coming soon! Nestled in the prestigious Edwards Landing community, this exquisite Colonial-style residence offers a harmonious blend of elegance and comfort. Built in 2002, this stunning home spans an impressive 3,676 square feet, showcasing meticulous craftsmanship and high-end finishes throughout. Step inside to discover a warm and inviting atmosphere, highlighted by a cozy fireplace that serves as the heart of the living space. The fully finished walkout basement provides additional room for entertainment or relaxation, seamlessly connecting indoor and outdoor living. With four spacious bedrooms and four and a half luxurious bathrooms, this home is designed for both privacy and togetherness. The gourmet kitchen is a chef's dream, equipped with top-of-the-line appliances and ample counter space, perfect for culinary creations and gatherings. The attached garage offers convenience and easy access, while the driveway provides additional parking for guests. Outside, the property boasts a beautifully landscaped yard, ideal for enjoying serene evenings or hosting gatherings. The absence of a pool allows for a low-maintenance lifestyle, giving you more time to savor the exclusive amenities and vibrant community surrounding you. Experience the perfect blend of luxury and comfort in this remarkable home, where every detail has been thoughtfully curated to create a sanctuary you'll be proud to call your own. Embrace a lifestyle of sophistication and tranquility in this exceptional residence.

Welcome to this beautifully maintained 4-bedroom single-family home in the highly sought-after Ashton Downs community, just minutes from historic Downtown Leesburg and the W&OD Trail. This is true gem and a rare opportunity not to be missed. Upon entering, you will be greeted by hardwood flooring throughout the main level and a spacious, functional floor plan designed for both everyday living and entertaining. The updated kitchen features recessed lighting, stainless steel appliances, a center island, and pantry. Adjacent to the kitchen, the family room has a gas fireplace with direct access to the rear deck and fully fenced yard. The main level also includes a private home office, formal living room, dining room, and an updated powder room. Upstairs, you will find four generously sized bedrooms and two fully renovated bathrooms. The spacious primary suite features a large walk-in closet and a beautifully updated en-suite bath with tile flooring, a double vanity with granite countertops, a soaking tub, and a separate shower. The basement provides abundant storage space and convenient access to the backyard. This home is turn key! Major system updates include a new water heater (2021), HVAC system (2018), and roof (2017), providing peace of mind for years to come. This one will not last long!

listings.address: 241 Edwards Ferry Rd NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: Welcome to 241 Edwards Ferry Road, a rarely available opportunity in one of Leesburg's most desirable and walkable locations. Just a short 10-minute walk from historic downtown Leesburg, this home offers the perfect blend of location, potential, and value. The centerpiece of the home is the beautifully renovated kitchen, completely updated just two years ago with modern cabinetry, updated countertops, stylish finishes, and quality appliances. Whether you're preparing a weeknight meal or entertaining guests, this inviting space is ready to enjoy from day one. While the kitchen has already been transformed, the rest of the home presents an exciting opportunity for buyers looking to build equity and make a home their own. This is not a fully renovated property-instead, it's a true value-add opportunity with great bones, plenty of character, and loads of upside for those with vision. Whether you're looking to update over time or undertake a more comprehensive renovation, the potential here is undeniable. Adding to the appeal, many of the major systems have already been addressed, including the roof, HVAC system, and water heater, all replaced within the last five years. With these big-ticket items already taken care of, you can focus your efforts on personalizing the home to match your style and needs. Natural light fills the living spaces, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere throughout. Outside, enjoy one of Leesburg's most sought-after locations, with award-winning restaurants, local boutiques, breweries, coffee shops, parks, and year-round community events all within walking distance. Homes in this location rarely come to market, especially those offering this combination of walkability, major system updates, and the chance to create something truly special. If you've been searching for a property with strong potential and room to add value, 241 Edwards Ferry Road is an opportunity you won't want to miss. Some of these images are AI generated

listings.address: 602 Shanks Evans Rd NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: ***Professional photos will be uploaded on Saturday 6/27*** Nestled on a corner lot in Leesburg's highly sought-after Potomac Crossing community, this beautifully maintained brick-front Lockmeade model offers the perfect blend of space, comfort, and connection. With 5 bedrooms, 3.5 baths, inviting indoor and outdoor living spaces, and a layout designed for the flow of everyday life, this is the kind of home where holiday celebrations, weeknight dinners, and life's simplest moments feel just a little more special. A welcoming two-story foyer with hardwood floors sets the tone upon entry. To the right, the formal living room flows seamlessly into the dining room, creating an elegant setting for entertaining family and friends. At the heart of the home, the kitchen features an island, upgraded countertops, and an adjoining breakfast room, all opening to the sun-drenched two-story family room anchored by a cozy gas fireplace. Together, the kitchen and family room create the true heart of the home - an inviting space where meals are shared, conversations linger, and memories are made. Step outside to the deck overlooking the fenced backyard, where indoor and outdoor living blend effortlessly. Whether enjoying a quiet morning coffee, hosting summer barbecues, tending a garden, or watching children and pets play, this outdoor space offers endless possibilities. The upper level hosts a generously sized primary suite complete with a walk-in closet and private en suite bath featuring new LVP flooring, a refreshed vanity with new countertops, and updated lighting. Three additional spacious bedrooms, each with ample closet space, are served by an updated hall bath with new LVP flooring, a refreshed vanity, and new lighting. Convenient upper-level laundry adds to the home's everyday functionality. The finished walkout lower level, completed in 2016, expands the home's living space with a large recreation room featuring a bar, an additional bedroom with an exceptionally large closet, and direct access to the backyard, making it an ideal space for guests, multi-generational living, a home office, gym, or playroom. Recent improvements provide peace of mind and a fresh, move-in ready feel, including new carpet (2026), fresh interior paint (2026), new LVP flooring and bathroom updates (2026), and a freshly sealed driveway (2026), along with a newer upper HVAC system, a finished lower level (2016), and a roof replacement (2018). Residents of Potomac Crossing enjoy an exceptional array of amenities, including a community pool, seven playgrounds, basketball courts, and approximately 2.5 miles of walking and jogging trails. The neighborhood is adjacent to the eight-acre Potomac Crossing Park, offering picnic pavilions, grills, and direct trail access to Balls Bluff Regional Park and the Potomac River. Ideally located within walking distance of Balls Bluff Elementary School and just minutes from Historic Downtown Leesburg, you'll enjoy easy access to the area's renowned restaurants, charming boutiques, local breweries, the W&OD Trail, grocery stores, cafes, movie theaters, bowling, and countless everyday conveniences. From cozy evenings by the fire to summer gatherings on the deck and adventures along nearby trails, this is more than a place to live - it's a place to put down roots, create traditions, and truly feel at home.

Charming 2-bedroom, 2 full bath bungalow in the heart of Downtown Leesburg's Old & Historic District offering the perfect blend of historic character and modern luxury. Nestled on picturesque Ayr Street, this thoughtfully designed home features a secluded retreat-like backyard with a beautiful flagstone patio and detached 1-car garage, along with a long driveway providing additional off-street parking. Inside, enjoy hardwood floors throughout, a gourmet kitchen, custom recessed lighting, custom built-in shelving, custom window seats, two fireplaces, and a fully finished basement that could serve as a third bedroom and includes rough-in plumbing for a 1/2 bath. The upper level offers a spacious primary suite with a private full bath, while the second upstairs full bath features a frameless glass shower enclosure. HVAC and hot water heater were replaced in 2020. Originally built in 1920, 4 Ayr Street is an historic property that was thoughtfully reimagined through a major renovation completed in 2007 by renowned local builder Paul Reimers as part of an award-winning infill development in Downtown Leesburg's Historic District. The home was designed to honor the architectural character and charm of the early 20th-century residences once found along Ayr Street, while seamlessly incorporating modern conveniences and updated living spaces for today's lifestyle. All just moments from shops, restaurants, parks, and everything Downtown Leesburg has to offer.

Thoughtfully and thoroughly maintained 4BD/2.5BA SFH showcasing exceptional pride of ownership and outstanding condition throughout. A gem of a home, 731 Emmet Court SW, sits on a peaceful cul-de-sac, framed by mature trees. An airy 2-story foyer welcomes you into the home. Gorgeous wood floors gleam throughout the main level. To your left, the foyer flows seamlessly into the den, followed by the formal dining room. An open doorway offers a partial separation between the formal dining and kitchen. Host dinners focused on good food and conversation without a view of the pots and pans. In contrast, the kitchen, informal dining, and large living room provide the best of an open floor plan, encouraging interconnected family living. The U-shaped kitchen features plenty of countertop space, modern appliances (2020), stylish accent lighting, a pantry, and a built-in desk. Enjoy verdant views of your private backyard while meal prepping or washing dishes. Large sliding glass doors transition you to the spacious wood deck, perfect for quiet moments surrounded by nature. French doors by the formal dining room also provide access to the deck. A convenient half bath is located on the main level. All bedrooms are located upstairs. The expansive primary bedroom features walk-in closets, large windows, and room for a sitting area and/or desk. Skylights in the primary en suite naturally brighten the entire space. Dual sinks, soaking tub, and shower stall complete the primary bath. Three additional bedrooms across the top floor share a full bath with a tub. Host loved ones in spacious guestrooms, dedicate an entire room to your creativity with a craft room, and/or enjoy an ideal work-from-home setup with a dedicated office. Home updates include a smart thermostat, updated hall bathroom (2021), new paint in all interior rooms (2020), and new wood floors (2020). HVAC installed (2015) and last serviced (2026). W/D conveniently located on the upper level. Outside, an attached 2-car garage and a generous driveway provide ample parking. A backyard shed delivers extra storage space. Favorably located in highly-ranked Loudon County Public Schools, within walking distance to Loudoun County High School! Easy access to the Dulles Toll Road and Leesburg Pike for your commute. Minutes to downtown Leesburg! Enjoy the easy drive to Costco, Wegmans, and Premium Outlet Mall. Equally accessible to a variety of outdoor activities, parks, and nature sanctuaries. Pop out of your driveway and onto the W&OD trail for sunlight and fresh air in no time at all. There is absolutely no shortage of renowned wineries, breweries, restaurants, shopping, and entertainment minutes from your front door. Make this gem of a home your home today!

Experience elevated living in this extraordinary Leesburg residence, where timeless design meets modern life on a beautifully landscaped 0.38-acre homesite. Extensively renovated with uncompromising attention to detail, this exceptional property offers a rare turnkey opportunity with high-end finishes and sophisticated upgrades throughout. The thoughtfully designed floor plan features 4 generously sized bedrooms and 5 beautifully appointed full bathrooms, creating an ideal balance of comfort and elegance. The heart of the home is a stunning gourmet kitchen outfitted with custom cabinetry, quartz surfaces, a dramatic waterfall island, designer backsplash, and premium Samsung stainless steel appliances-perfectly suited for both everyday living and entertaining. Natural light pours through all-new energy-efficient windows, illuminating the refined interiors accented by luxury flooring, custom millwork, modern lighting, and impeccable craftsmanship at every turn. Spa-inspired bathrooms showcase designer tile selections and upscale finishes, while major system upgrades-including a new HVAC system, electrical panel, water heater, and more-provide peace of mind for years to come. Outdoor spaces are equally impressive, featuring an expansive Trex deck overlooking a private, fully fenced backyard with fresh landscaping and lush new sod. A newly paved driveway and oversized garage with upgraded features complete the home's impressive list of enhancements. Situated in an established neighborhood with no HOA, residents enjoy convenient access to walking trails, top-rated schools, premier shopping, dining, and commuter routes. Just minutes from Leesburg Premium Outlets, Costco, Route 7, and Route 15, this exceptional property delivers the perfect blend of luxury, convenience, and modern living.

Beautifully appointed and rich in character, this four-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath residence by renowned local builder Paul Reimers is ideally situated in the heart of historic downtown Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed and meticulously maintained, the home offers an exceptional blend of timeless craftsmanship and modern convenience. The interior showcases gleaming wood floors that flow seamlessly throughout the main living spaces, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. At the heart of the home, a well-equipped kitchen features stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and ample cabinetry-perfectly suited for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. A highly desirable main-level primary bedroom offers both comfort and convenience, providing a private retreat with easy accessibility. This thoughtfully positioned space enhances the home's livability, ideal for a variety of lifestyle needs. Upstairs, additional generously sized bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, home office space, or personal retreats, complemented by a well-appointed bath that reflect the home's classic aesthetic. Outdoors, a fully fenced yard creates a private oasis, ideal for relaxation, play, or al fresco gatherings. A large shed adds both functionality and storage, enhancing the property's practical appeal. Set just moments from Leesburg's charming shops, dining, and historic landmarks, this exceptional home presents a rare opportunity to enjoy refined living in one of Northern Virginia's most desirable settings. Photos to be uploaded 4/25

Spacious 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath home on a corner lot in a desirable Leesburg community. Bright and open layout with generously sized rooms throughout. Well-equipped kitchen with stainless steel appliances, gas cooking, and double ovens, plus both formal and casual dining areas. Large primary suite with dual closets and an ensuite bath featuring double vanities, jetted tub, and separate shower. Finished room in the lower level offers flexible bonus space for office, gym, or guest use, along with ample storage. Enjoy outdoor living with a large deck and fully fenced backyard. Two-car garage included. Community amenities feature a pool, walking paths, and playgrounds, with close proximity to Bolen Park, shopping, dining, and the Compass Creek development. Convenient access to Route 7, the Leesburg Bypass, and Dulles Greenway for commuting.

Beautifully reimagined with timeless finishes and thoughtful updates throughout, this exceptional residence offers the ease of one-level living paired with the flexibility of expansive interior space-all set on a generous corner lot in a quiet, established neighborhood with no HOA. Designed with both everyday comfort and effortless entertaining in mind, the home features three spacious bedrooms and three full baths, complemented by rich hardwood flooring throughout the main level, fresh designer-inspired paint, and new carpeting in every bedroom. Custom closet systems enhance each bedroom, providing exceptional organization and storage, while the home's accessible design includes the potential for handicap-friendly living with a roll-in shower. At the heart of the home, the renovated kitchen combines style and functionality with abundant workspace, a new microwave, and an inviting layout that flows seamlessly into the main living areas, creating an ideal setting for gathering with family and friends. Outdoor living is equally inviting. A newly constructed Trex deck overlooks the freshly landscaped yard, offering the perfect backdrop for morning coffee, evening relaxation, or outdoor entertaining. Significant recent improvements provide lasting value and peace of mind, including a new HVAC system (August 2025), gutter guards, and an oversized two-car garage with extra depth for storage, hobbies, or workshop space. The fully finished lower level dramatically expands the home's versatility, featuring a private exterior entrance and space well suited for a guest suite, multigenerational living, a home office, fitness studio, or recreation room. With the potential for an additional bedroom, the lower level offers exceptional flexibility to accommodate your evolving lifestyle. Ideally located just minutes from shopping, dining, parks, scenic walking trails, schools, and major commuter routes, this move-in-ready home offers the rare combination of sophisticated updates, functional design, and an established setting-creating an exceptional opportunity for those seeking both comfort and convenience.

Welcome to 306 Lounsbury Ct NE - a beautifully updated split-level home in the heart of historic Leesburg offering NO HOA and fully paid-off solar panels for exceptional long-term value. More than just move-in ready, this home offers a rare combination of comfort, efficiency, and smart homeownership. While many homeowners experienced rising utility costs this winter, the current owners enjoyed electric bills averaging approximately just $10/month thanks to the owned solar panel system. It's a valuable advantage in today's market, providing meaningful monthly savings and protection against increasing energy costs - without the added expense of a solar loan or lease. Inside, the home features a comfortable and functional layout with four bedrooms and two full bathrooms upstairs, including a spacious primary suite with dual closets for practical storage. Natural light fills the home throughout the day, while the skylight creates a warm and inviting ambiance in the evening. The main level is designed for both everyday living and entertaining. The spacious kitchen opens to the family room, where a cozy fireplace and built-in entertainment center create a welcoming gathering space. French glass doors offer flexibility and privacy when desired, while sliding doors lead directly to the backyard for easy indoor-outdoor living. A formal dining room and an additional living area provide plenty of space to host guests, relax, or work comfortably from home. Recent updates include fresh paint throughout, brand-new carpet, updated lighting, refreshed bathrooms, and a clean, modern feel from top to bottom. Additional highlights include a two-car garage, spacious backyard, and an unbeatable location just a few blocks away from Downtown Leesburg, where you can enjoy local shops, restaurants, community events, and historic attractions while still benefiting from a quiet residential setting. The home is also located just one mile from Ida Lee Park, Leesburg's renowned 138-acre recreation destination featuring indoor and outdoor pools, sports fields, walking trails, playgrounds, and a full recreation center. With an improved price, energy-saving features, and a highly desirable location, this is an opportunity you do not want to miss. (Virtually Staged)

OPEN HOUSE JUNE 27th, 11am-1pm. See the rest, then come see the best! You will immediately know you are home upon entering. Enjoy beautiful scraped hardwood flooring throughout the main level, with refinished kitchen cabinets, a new island and granite counters. Newly refinished white cabinets and "agreeable" grey walls perfectly complement each other, and you will thoroughly enjoy the spotless appliances and beautiful view of your fenced yard from the kitchen windows. Enjoy time together with family and friends in the family room off the kitchen, and impress your guests with the freshly painted deck with a newly installed canopy for shade on hot days. The upstairs boasts 4bd/2ba, with the comfort and warmth of newer carpeting. The newly finished downstairs features a nice family room, a partial kitchen, reading/study area, a full bath and a non-conforming 5th bedroom (or den, office, etc). Walkout to the lush and fully fenced backyard, and store your seasonal items in the built-in shed. You will also love the fresh clean look of freshly painted doors and trim, with new stainless hardware on all doors. With a new roof (2019), Trane HVAC, and over-sized gas hot water heater, you're assured many years of carefree living.

A Century of Character in Downtown Leesburg Leesburg Historic District, Leesburg, VA 3 BD | 1 BA | 1/3 Acre Lot | Built 1910 | Detached 2-Car Garage | Sold As-Is Steeped in history and full of original charm, this 1910 craftsman-era home sits proudly in the heart of Leesburg's beloved Historic District - lovingly cared for by the same family for over 50 years. Offered for sale as-is, this is a rare chance to own a piece of Leesburg history and make it your own. Step up onto the welcoming covered front porch - the perfect spot for a morning coffee - and into a home that has been cherished across generations. Inside, warm and cozy bedrooms invite rest, while the bathroom retains its original claw-foot tub, a true hallmark of the era. Original hardwood floors are believed to lie beneath the current flooring, waiting to be uncovered and restored to their former glory. The property sits on an exceptional 1/3-acre lot - a genuinely rare find in downtown Leesburg - offering space, privacy, and possibilities that simply don't come along often in this location. A detached two-car garage adds even more practical value. Whether you're a preservation enthusiast, an investor, or a buyer dreaming of restoring a classic home to its original splendor, this property delivers unmatched potential in one of Northern Virginia's most sought-after historic neighborhoods. Properties like this - with this much soul - rarely come to market. HISTORIC DISTRICT NOTICE: This property lies within the Town of Leesburg Historic District. Future exterior renovations and alterations are subject to review and approval by the Leesburg Board of Architectural Review (BAR). Prospective buyers are encouraged to familiarize themselves with applicable guidelines prior to making an offer. ADDITIONAL NOTICE: The home is currently occupied and furnished. AI-assisted editing was used to remove furnishings from interior listing photos. Property is being sold strictly as-is.

Come home to a place that instantly calms your mind with its expansive serene backyard views. This one of a kind lot will not disappoint with open views and perfect walking distance to downtown Leesburg and Ida Lee Rec Center. This stunning renovated Colonial home in the desirable Exeter community boasts three levels of excellent living space, featuring 3 spacious bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms. All major updates include windows(2021), roof(2013), HVAC(2020) and siding(2021). The sellers have received a estimate to add an egress window to basement bedroom for $8500.00. The gourmet kitchen, complete with a pantry, new quartz countertops and updated appliances, flows seamlessly into the family room, perfect for entertaining. Enjoy brand new luxury laminate plank and ceramic tile flooring throughout, along with energy-efficient windows and a cozy wood fireplace. Recent renovations in 2024-2025 enhance the property's appeal, while the fully finished daylight basement offers additional living space with custom wood bar, kitchenette, and bedroom/office design. The exterior features include a deck, hot tub, and enclosed storage all set against a backdrop of endless open space views. Community amenities include a pool, basketball courts, and playgrounds, fostering a vibrant neighborhood atmosphere. Conveniently located within walking distance to schools, parks, and beautiful downtown Leesburg , this home offers both comfort and community engagement. With ample parking and a well-maintained yard, this property is a perfect blend of style and functionality.

MAJOR PRICE IMPROVEMENT! Incredible value in one of Leesburg's most sought-after communities, with the major updates already completed for your peace of mind. Recent improvements include new windows and siding (2021), LeafGuard gutters (2021), HVAC system (2020), roof (2013), sliding glass basement door (2021), sprinkler system enhancements (2023), front door (2024), and freshly re-sanded patio surfaces (2026). Simply move in and enjoy. Nestled on a quiet private cul-de-sac, this beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers an exceptional combination of space, comfort, and outdoor living. The expansive, fully fenced backyard provides the perfect setting for play, pets, gardening, or entertaining. Inside, the bright and welcoming main level features spacious living and dining areas anchored by a double-sided fireplace shared between the family room and sunroom/office, creating warm, inviting spaces for everyday living and memorable gatherings. The kitchen showcases freshly painted cabinetry, granite countertops, modern hardware, a touch/touchless faucet, and a newer refrigerator (2021), blending style and functionality. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite serves as a private retreat with a beautifully renovated, spa-inspired bath completed in 2025, featuring a jetted tub. The additional bathrooms have also been thoughtfully refreshed, and all toilets throughout the home were replaced in 2025 and 2026. The finished walkout basement adds incredible flexibility with a full bath, direct backyard access, and surround sound speakers that convey. Whether you envision a recreation room, media space, home gym, home office, or guest suite, this versatile level can easily adapt to your lifestyle. Outside, the custom brick patio, completed in 2019, creates an ideal space to enjoy outdoor dining, summer barbecues, morning coffee, or evenings with family and friends. The professionally landscaped yard also includes a sprinkler system, French drain, and an Amish-built storage shed (2023). The oversized 418-square-foot two-car garage provides ample room for vehicles, storage, and hobbies. Located in the highly desirable Greenway Farm community, residents enjoy convenient access to Greenway Park, Greenway Farms Pool, shopping, dining, commuter routes, and Route 15. Neighborhood amenities include outdoor pools, tennis courts, volleyball courts, playgrounds, walking trails, and beautifully maintained common areas. Offering an ideal cul-de-sac location, a generous fenced lot, extensive updates, and exceptional value, this move-in-ready home presents a rare opportunity in today's Leesburg market. Schedule your private showing today and discover everything this exceptional property has to offer.

New price on this stunning Colonial with thoroughly updated flair, sited on a peaceful cul-de-sac in sought after Potomac Station! The home is set in the quiet of suburbia with easy access to paths and trail while recreation centers, fine dining, cultural events, sports venues and shopping are an easy drive away. Thoughtfully designed and recently renovated, the home features 4 spacious bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms. Owners can retire in their private suite with a sizable sitting area and an en-suite bath featuring a 5-foot Jacuzzi soaking tub. Additional upstairs bedrooms are generously sized. On the main level, step into the two-story foyer and the floor plan features an expansive family room with fireplace, living room, formal dining room and an open concept updated kitchen boasting 2026 stainless steel appliances. The kitchen leads to a brand new 2026 gorgeous custom Trex deck with space enough for grills and smokers, making entertaining fun for family, friends or business as easy parking provides 2 spaces on the driveway in addition to the 2-car garage and further parking on the cul de sac. The laundry room features 2024 Speed Queen Washer and Dryer. A Kinetico water treatment and softener system added in 2024 and a whole house Honeywell Electronic Air Cleaner system provide optimal living conditions. A gas fired, hot water heater unit has been upgraded to 120 gallons to serve the sizable Jacuzzi soaking tub of the primary bathroom. The 2023 GAF Timberline roof is covered by a 35 year transferable warranty An expansive room with walkout to the lush backyard as well as a full bathroom make the finished part of the basement fit for any use your lifestyle may require. The 2-car garage features upgraded workshop electric with multiple 15 amp and 20 amp outlets as well as a 240 volt single phase service allowing faster EV charging or powerful DIY applications. Upgraded workshop wiring is also available in the 400 sq.ft. unfinished part of the basement which provides huge storage space. Access to Verizon 1.0 GB high speed service, Ethernet Category 5 hard wired throughout the house and proximity to the commuter bus lot, the Silver Line, and Government and Contractor and IT company offices in Chantilly, Dulles, Reston, Tyson's Corner, and Washington DC make this home perfect for work from home or occasional or regular commuting.

Welcome to this Ryan Homes-built detached residence offering 5 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, and a 2-car garage in the highly sought-after Courtland Rural Village community. Designed for comfortable living and entertaining, the home features four bedrooms on the upper level and a fully finished walk-out basement. The lower level has been recently updated with brand-new luxury vinyl plank flooring, newly finished stairs, and fresh paint throughout. This versatile space includes a bedroom/den, full bathroom, wet bar, exercise room, and spacious recreation areas. The main level showcases hardwood flooring throughout and a thoughtfully designed layout. The gourmet kitchen features granite countertops, a breakfast bar, and an adjoining sunroom. Formal living and dining rooms provide elegant gathering spaces, while the kitchen opens to a dramatic two-story family room filled with natural light. Step outside to enjoy the relatively flat, fenced backyard with alley access. The walk-out lower level leads to a covered patio, providing year-round outdoor enjoyment, while the expansive deck with stair access offers breathtaking sunset views overlooking the historic Oatlands Historic House and Gardens. Meticulously maintained and move-in ready, this exceptional home offers the perfect combination of space, comfort, and scenic surroundings.

listings.address: 715 Valley View Ave SW, Leesburg, VA, 20175
listings.description: Set on a generous 0.60-acre lot in Leesburg, this all-brick charmer delivers the space, character, and flexibility that are genuinely hard to find. With 4 bedrooms and 2 full baths spread across three levels, there's room to live, work, and unwind on your own terms. Arrive to a large wrap-around front porch that sets the tone before you even step inside. Soaring 10-foot ceilings on the main level create an airy, open feel, complemented by warm wood floors, fresh paint throughout, and a wood-burning fireplace that anchors the living space with character and warmth. The kitchen is well-equipped with a double wall oven, cooktop, dishwasher, refrigerator, washer, and dryer and is ready for both busy mornings and relaxed weekend gatherings. The third level is a finished attic that feels like the ultimate retreat. It is a flexible hangout space perfectly suited for a media room, playroom, home office, or whatever fits your lifestyle. Out back, a private backyard oasis awaits. The expansive lot offers genuine pool potential, with the space and layout to make it a reality. The home is connected to public water, and a deactivated well on the property adds a charming nod to the land's history. The detached garage rounds out the package with additional storage and parking. A standing seam metal roof adds durability and curb appeal built to last for decades. Located near Leesburg's shops, dining, parks, and historic downtown, this home delivers the perfect blend of timeless craftsmanship and everyday convenience.

COMING SOON! Open Houses Sat 7/11 and Sun 7/12 2 - 4PM. Will go live 7/9. Prof photos earlier that week. Original owners have lovingly maintained and cared for this 5BR, 3.5BA, 2 car garage home with finished basement & front porch with stone facade. Enjoy the outdoors in your private backyard: a putting green, stadium stairs to the large patio, newly shingled shed, a vegetable garden, koi pond, and an inviting walking path around the trees and perennials on the .22AC lot! Pride of ownership abounds throughout. An updated kitchen with tile backsplash, quartz counters, SS appliances, updated lighting, an island with shiplap end caps and new HDWD floor. The neutral palette is carried throughout. New carpet in the family room with gas fireplace is adjacent to the kitchen for open living. A breakfast nook with a newer sliding glass door to the backyard adds natural light. The living and dining rooms create the left wing of the main level with a bay window in the dining room. Upstairs the spacious primary bedroom with cathedral ceiling offers a walk-in closet and spacious luxury bath with soaking tub and separate shower with new shower enclosure, plus double sinks. Three ancillary bedrooms, a full bath and the laundry room finish this level. On the lower level, a legal 5th BR, full bath, kitchenette and ample sized rec room add to the finished living space. Beautiful landscaping with 4 season interest delights the eye and provides great curb appeal.

Prepare to be impressed by this stunning, fully renovated home where no detail has been overlooked.
